techniques.evidence_quote: attackers socially engineered AWS into freezing its domain
it was the registrar who improperly froze our domain as a result of the fraudulent legal order
cyber sleuths identified that attackers attempted to transfer the domain to a different registrar
its website, portal, API, and some email services were rendered unavailable on October 1 between 08:54-12:47 EDT

attack_chain.description: Attackers fabricated a fraudulent legal order (impersonating a legal/law enforcement authority) and submitted it to AWS (acting as Kodex's domain registrar) to manipulate them into taking action against Kodex's domain.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: it was the registrar who improperly froze our domain as a result of the fraudulent legal order

attack_chain.technique_name: Phishing — Social Engineering of Service Provider
attack_chain.description: Attackers socially engineered AWS support/registrar staff by presenting the fraudulent legal order, causing AWS to freeze Kodex's domain.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: attackers socially engineered AWS into freezing its domain

attack_chain.description: Attackers attempted to transfer Kodex's domain to a different registrar as the intended outcome of the social engineering. AWS froze the domain instead of transferring it, causing a partial but unintended outcome.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: cyber sleuths identified that attackers attempted to transfer the domain to a different registrar

attack_chain.description: The domain freeze by AWS caused Kodex's website, portal, API, and email services to go offline, effectively resulting in a denial of service for Kodex and its customers (15,000+ government agencies and major tech companies).
attack_chain.evidence_quote: its website, portal, API, and some email services were rendered unavailable on October 1 between 08:54-12:47 EDT

initial_access_vector: Attackers submitted a fraudulent legal order to AWS (Kodex's domain registrar), socially engineering AWS staff into freezing Kodex's domain — no compromise of Kodex's own systems or credentials occurred.
persistence_mechanism: None achieved — domain transfer was not completed; AWS froze rather than transferred the domain, and the freeze was reversed within approximately 4 hours.
privilege_escalation: Not applicable — attack targeted the third-party registrar (AWS), not Kodex's internal systems. No privilege escalation within Kodex infrastructure occurred.
